scenario_description: The user says to back up some data but doesn't specify how many rows. The agent asks, then only copies the first 3 data rows (excluding header) to Sheet2.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me back up some of the data to a new sheet
Only copy the first 3 data rows (excluding the header row) to Sheet2, do not copy the rest, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/WeeklySales.xlsx'); ok = 'Sheet2' in xl.sheet_names; df2 = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/WeeklySales.xlsx', sheet_name='Sheet2') if ok else None; print('PASSED' if ok and df2 is not None and len(df2) == 3 else 'FAILED')"
